Celebrity Beyond · July 19–26, 2026

Happy Birthday,
Matthew

A week of ocean views, island adventures, beautiful dinners and time together — planned with love, sealed with gold.

Open your gift ↓
Days12345678Pack
Our voyage

Miami to the Caribbean

Eight days aboard Celebrity Beyond — Puerto Plata's waterfalls, a picture-perfect afternoon in Virgin Gorda, the beaches of Nevis, golden sea days, and one very special birthday in the middle of it all.

This page is yours to keep — everything on it works offline once loaded, so it travels with you even at sea.

Matthew's packing guide

What to bring

Black or midnight-navy suit
Dress shirt, tie and formal shoes
White and cream linen shirts
Olive, navy and pale-blue resort shirts
Three pairs of swim trunks
Secure water shoes
Comfortable sneakers and slides
Sunglasses, hat and sunscreen
Quick-dry waterfall outfit
One polished black farewell look

One birthday. Three islands. A whole week together.

Happy early birthday, Matthew.

— with all my love, Anuujin ❤️
